title: 8 Contingency Procedures for Stop Payment Requests and Desktop Draft Stock Orders
body_text:
8	Contingency Procedures for Stop Payment Requests and Desktop Draft Stock Orders
8.1	Overview
Stop payments and draft stock orders are made on FX Drafts. If FX Drafts is unavailable, contact Convera directly. See Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
END
